title: Lethal Craft
description: It (badly) adds Lethal Company to Minecraft!
body:
![logo2](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/5de52121466efc9d8c17b0dfe0cfbc2b9b49eee5.png)

This mod adds features from Lethal Company to Minecraft! Things like the TZP Inhalent and Stop Signs have been added and buffs and weapons. Find the new Fire Exit structure buried in the Assurance biome! Features include:

Fire Exit Structure

Assurance Biome

4 New Mobs

A bunch of trash

Airhorn

Clownhorn

Stop Sign

WIP Butler Knife

Comedy Mask

TZP Inhalent

Zap Gun

Employee Villager

Nutcracker Shotgun/Shotgun Bullets

And more to come!

None of this is offical by Zeekerss but i made it as a thank you to them. THANK YOU ZEEKERSS!!
